/usr/bin/c++    -fsigned-char -W -Wall -Werror=return-type -Werror=non-virtual-dtor -Werror=address -Werror=sequence-point -Wformat -Werror=format-security -Wmissing-declarations -Wmissing-prototypes -Wstrict-prototypes -Wundef -Winit-self -Wpointer-arith -Wshadow -Wsign-promo -Wuninitialized -Winit-self -Wno-delete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-comment -Wimplicit-fallthrough=3 -Wno-strict-overflow -fdiagnostics-show-option -pthread -fomit-frame-pointer -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections    -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG  -DNDEBUG   -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/opencv_version.dir/opencv_version.cpp.o -o ../../bin/opencv_version  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yun/opencv-4.1.0/build/lib: -ldl -lm -lpthread -lrt ../../lib/libopencv_core.so.4.1.0
